summary: Comprehensive testing of HappyCo Concierge V1 seed system and preview reset functionality completed. Backend API is fully functional with all seed requirements met. Frontend has minor session persistence issue but core functionality works.

ui_bugs.issue: Admin session doesn't persist when navigating between pages - redirects back to login

integration_issues.issue: Session cookie/authentication state not maintained during page navigation

passed_tests: All diagnostics endpoints (runtime, session, collections, seeds, health)
Preview reset with incorrect phrase (400 validation)
Seed data validation - all required collections present
Seed metadata validation - shows successful demoA seed
Access controls - manager/resident blocked from admin endpoints (403)
Frontend login page displays all three seeded demo accounts
Frontend shows seeded data (Alex Chen resident, 3 properties)
Production bootstrap remains not runnable as expected

success_percentage.frontend: 80% (login and data display working, session persistence issue)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend session persistence issue - admin login works but session doesn't persist when navigating to /app/admin/diagnostics. Check cookie settings, session management, and auth context in React frontend.
